title: Penemuan Cerah di Gang Berliku
theme: Menjelajahi sebuah gang tersembunyi di pasar tua dan menemukan keindahan tak terduga serta koneksi manusia yang menghangatkan hati.

cover.prompt: A serene traditional Indonesian market at golden hour, bathed in warm, gentle light. The scene focuses on the rich textures of various vendor stalls: meticulously stacked spices, vibrant fabrics, and fresh produce. A clear pathway winds through the market, guiding the eye. The composition emphasizes environmental details, with a shallow depth of field creating a subtle softness in the background. An artistic, slightly out-of-focus detail of a vintage camera lens rests on a wooden surface, suggesting observation and routine. The overall atmosphere conveys a sense of familiar beauty and quiet contemplation, with no explicit human figures, focusing on objects and the marketplace environment.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Seorang fotografer yang bosan menemukan gang misterius di pasar, yang awalnya tampak menakutkan namun akhirnya mengarah ke komunitas tersembunyi yang hangat dan penuh kehidupan.
